title: Blue Moon
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Blue}} {{Quote|Welcome to the Blue Moon. You lookin' for a job, sweet stuff?''"
"''No thanks. I'm looking for a guy just under two meters, looks like a farm boy.''"
"''Sweet stuff, what you want with him when you got me?|Blue Moon doorman and [[Jan Ors]]|audio=BlueMoonSweetStuff-DFSftE.flac|[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]]}} The '''Blue Moon''' was a strip club and bar located in the city of [[Trid]] on [[Danuta]]. ==Description== A mirror ran the wall behind, specked by [[Insect/Legends|insects]], before which were several bottles and liquid vessels. Ten booths lined the opposite wall. The tables around the salon were too small, although groups of customers tried to fit themselves around them. According to policy, only groups of people were allowed to occupy a booth after [[Standard hour/Legends|8:00 pm]].''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' A bored-looking [[Dancer (occupation)|dancer]] tried to entertain some customers up toward the front, during the duration of her two-[[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] shift. The [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]] also played there. According to [[Meck Odom]], the food was like [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorrean]] garbage, but he frequented it to enjoy Max Rebo. The restrooms led to a backdoor, exiting to the site of the building into an alley with poorly tended shrubbery and pools of vomit. ==History== Locals, colonists and [[Farmer/Legends|farmers]] came there but most of its customers were [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] and [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] who had no other place to go. The proprietor wore usually a dingy apron, and was obsessed in wiping the same section of the bar. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent [[Kyle Katarn]] met his old [[Carida Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] roommate, [[Meck Odom]], in the ''Blue Moon''. [[Jan Ors]] who was shadowing Katarn, entered the club, and the doorman asked her if she'd be interested to work there. Katarn needed Odom's assistance to [[Mission to Danuta|gain access]] into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Danuta research facility|research facility]] in Trid. Prior to their exclusive contract with [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]] played the Blue Moon at the time of Katarn and Odom's fateful meeting. {{Company-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' *[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Bars and clubs]] [[Category:Danuta locations]]
